texto: Life is so full of unpredictable beauty and strange surprises. Sometimes that beauty is too much for me to handle. Do you know that feeling? When something is just too beautiful? When someone says something or writes something or plays something that moves you to the point of tears, maybe even changes you.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Mark Oliver Everett que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Life is so full of unpredictable beauty and strange surprises. Sometimes that beauty is too much …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, beauty, surprises, com foco em mudanca e vida.
